package sample

import (
	"bytes"
	"fmt"
	"reflect"
)

func Build(items []string) int {
	total := 0
	for _, item := range items {
		buf := bytes.NewBuffer(nil)
		_ = buf
		_ = fmt.Sprintf("%v", item)
		_ = reflect.TypeOf(item)
		payload := make([]byte, len(item))
		total += len(payload)
	}

	return total
}
